title: Triangle Area Calculator - Calculate Area of a Triangle
description: Free triangle area calculator. Calculate area using base and height, three sides (Heron's formula), or two sides and included angle.
keywords: triangle area calculator, area of triangle, heron's formula, triangle calculator
intro: Calculate the area of a triangle using multiple methods: base × height, Heron's formula (3 sides), or SAS (two sides + angle).

faq.q: How to calculate triangle area with base and height?
faq.a: Area = ½ × base × height. Example: base 10, height 6 → Area = ½ × 10 × 6 = 30.
For a triangle with sides a, b, c: s = (a+b+c)/2, Area = √(s(s-a)(s-b)(s-c)). Works for any triangle when you know all three sides.
